name: unit-converter
description: Web-based unit converter (length, weight, volume, area).

scripts.start: node -e "require('http').createServer((req, res) => { if (req.url === '/') req.url = '/index.html'; require('fs').createReadStream(__dirname + req.url).pipe(res); }).listen(8080); console.log('Serving on http://localhost:8080');"
